hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who last updated the record.

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns the connection.

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the connection.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: connectionId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the connection.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version number of the connection.

hasAttributes.name: effectiveStart
hasAttributes.description: Enter the start date of the connection.

hasAttributes.name: isMaster
hasAttributes.description: Indicates that this is the master record.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: relatedConnectionId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the reciprocal connection record.

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: Type additional information to describe the connection, such as the length or quality of the relationship.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Shows the business unit that the record owner belongs to.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: record2Id
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the target record.

hasAttributes.name: record2IdObjectTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: The name of the entity linked by record2Id

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: record2RoleId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the secondary party's role or relationship with the primary party.

hasAttributes.name: effectiveEnd
hasAttributes.description: Enter the end date of the connection.

hasAttributes.name: record1RoleId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the primary party's role or relationship with the second party.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was created. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was last updated. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: record1Id
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the source record.

hasAttributes.name: record1IdObjectTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: The name of the entity linked by record1Id

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Shows whether the connection is active or inactive. Inactive connections are read-only and can't be edited unless they are reactivated.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who last updated the record on behalf of another user.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the team who owns the connection.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the local currency for the record to make sure budgets are reported in the correct currency.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Shows the conversion rate of the record's currency. The exchange rate is used to convert all money fields in the record from the local currency to the system's default currency.

hasAttributes.name: record2ObjectTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Shows the record type of the target record.

hasAttributes.name: record1ObjectTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Shows the record type of the source record.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Name of the connection.

hasAttributes.name: entityImageId
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.
